title: Ninshu: Origins Naruto Mod
description: Ninshu: Origins is a Naruto Minecraft mod featuring jutsu, iconic items, and an immersive ninja experience.
body:
**Introduction:**
Embark on an extraordinary journey into the world of "Ninshu: Origins," where the art of jutsu, formidable armors, intricate stats, and a tapestry of unprecedented experiences await. Our mod is a testament to the limitless possibilities within Minecraft, presenting a diverse arsenal of over 500 jutsus that encompass both canonical and non-canonical techniques from the Naruto universe.

**Key Features:**
- Stats: With the vast variety of stats, you will always be unique.
- Techniques: Countless secret techniques to try out.
- Forms: Hundreds of forms with different variations for each.

**Mod Highlights:**
One of our best aspects is our character customization feature. The character customization feature really brings the whole thing to life. You can customize your own character and make them completely unique to others across your server. With the Dojutsus, you can obtain even more uniqueness. Our Dojutsu system allows you to have one dojutsu per eye, or put one in both.

**Compatibility:**
Compatible with Java Minecraft versions 1.19.2. Works well with popular mods like "JourneyMap" and "Traveler's Backpack." Compatible with other creature mods for enhanced gameplay.

**How to Use:**
- Installation is simple with our user-friendly guide.
- Upon joining, you will be given a tutorial on how to play.
- In order to download the mod, you will also have to download it's dependencies.

**Dependencies:**
- GeckoLib:
- playerAnimator:
- Pehkui:

**Screenshots or Videos:**
Check under the tab, "Images" for screenshots.
For videos, click the link underneath.
- YouTube

**Credits and Acknowledgments:**
Special thanks to our team for their dedication and creativity in bringing "Ninshu: Origins" to life.

All credits go to, Naruto, Viz Media, and Shonen Jump.

Credits (for some models) go to Shinobi War, ran by Younara on Discord.

Software used, Mcreator, IntelliJ.

**Conclusion:**
Unleash your potential, embrace the allure of ancient techniques, and redefine your Minecraft journey with "Ninshu: Origins." Immerse yourself in a world where jutsus, armors, stats, and untold adventures converge, promising an experience that transcends the ordinary. Join us and embark on an adventure that fuses the mystical and the imaginative, setting the stage for an unparalleled gaming escapade.

We, the Ninshu: Origins Dev Team, reserve the right to deny access for the mods use on servers.
If you use our mod in your server, please do not charge money or any type of credit for selling any items from this mod without a managers/owners approval.

All assets within the mod are ours, you do not have permission to use them.

If you are charging money or any type of credit for selling any items from this mod, we require a 30% share of any profit made.
